title: EVM Brochure for Electors on use of EVM and VVPAT
Regarding Brochure for Presiding Officers on use EVM and VVPAT
Census Data 2011
summary:
**Executive Summary**  
The District Census Handbook for Ranchi (Jharkhand) – part of the 2011 Census of India – presents village‑ and town‑level demographic, socio‑economic, and household‑amenity data collected during the first phase of the 2011 Census, together with supplementary non‑census information on infrastructure and services.

**Key Points**  
- Publication: *District Census Handbook, Ranchi* – Series‑21, Part XII‑B, Directorate of Census Operations, Jharkhand.  
- Core component: Primary Census Abstract (PCA) providing population totals (including Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes) for each village and town.  
- Supplementary tables (Sections II) cover household ownership, dwelling‑room count, housing type, drinking‑water source, lighting, latrine facility, drainage, kitchen availability, cooking fuel, and ownership of banking services and specified assets (all referenced to 2011).  
- Includes non‑census Village/Town Directory data on education, health, water, communication, transport, electricity, banking, etc.  
- Features a historical note on Lance Naik Albert Ekka (Jharkhand‑born war hero) as a motivational motif.  
- Document structure: Foreword, Preface, Acknowledgements, History & Scope, Administrative Setup, Important Statistics, District Highlights, Brief History, Urban & Rural PCA sections, and Appendix tables.  

**Important Dates / Deadlines**  
- The data pertain to the **Census of India 2- No specific future deadlines are mentioned; the handbook records information gathered during the **first phase (House Listing and Housing Census) of the 2011 Census**, which was conducted in 2010‑2011.  

**Action Items**  
- The handbook is primarily a reference resource; it does not prescribe actions for the reader.  
- Users (government planners, researchers, policymakers) are expected to **utilize the presented statistics for district‑level planning, policy formulation, and development programming** based on the 2011 baseline.

title: Result under NHM Adv 1/2025
summary:
**Executive Summary**  
The NHM Adv 1/2025 result announces the merit‑based shortlist of ANM candidates who appeared in the written test held on 14 September 2025, ranking them by total weighted marks and assigning UR‑category shortlist numbers.

**Key Points**  
- **Exam Date:** Written test conducted on **14 September 2025**.  
- **Post:** ANM (Auxiliary Nurse Midwife).  
- **Selection Basis:** Merit list prepared from **total weighted marks** (out of 100).  
- **Top Scores:** Highest mark = 97.00 (Priyanka Kumari, UR‑1); lowest shown in snippet = 81.60 (Amrita Minj, UR‑51).  
- **Category:** All candidates listed belong to the **UR (Unreserved)** selection category, irrespective of their original caste/category (BC‑I, BC‑II, SC, ST, etc.).  
- **Status:** Each candidate is marked **“Shortlist UR‑X”** indicating their provisional position in the UR merit list.  
- **Document Structure:** The list is presented in two continuous tables (S.No 1‑35 and 36‑52) with columns: Application No., Roll No., Candidate Name, Post Applied, Gender, Category, Selection Category, Total Weighted Marks, Status.  

**Important Dates / Deadlines**  
- **Written Test:** 14 September 2025 (explicitly mentioned).  
- ****Executive Summary**  
The NHM Adv 1/2025 result publishes the merit‑based shortlist of ANM candidates who appeared in the written test held on 14 September 2025, ranking them by total weighted marks and assigning UR‑category shortlist numbers.

**Key Points**  
- **Exam Date:** Written test conducted on **14 September 2025**.

- **Category:** All candidates listed belong to the **UR (Unreserved)** selection category, irrespective of their original caste/category (BC‑I, BC‑II, SC, ST, etc.).

**Important Dates / Deadlines**  
- **Written Test:** 14 September 2025 (explicitly mentioned).  
- **Result Publication:** Date of this notice (implied as the current NHM Adv 1/2025 release).  

**Action Items (Typical for such NHM results)**  
- Shortlisted candidates should **prepare for document verification / counseling** as per the schedule that will be issued separately by the NHM authority.  
- Candidates must **bring original certificates** (educational, caste/category, identity, etc.) and **photocopies** for verification.  
- Any **discrepancies** in the published data should be reported to the NHM recruitment cell within the stipulated grievance‑redressal window (usually 3–5 days from result publication).

title: Counseling Process for 16 Selected Candidates for Graduate Trained Teacher, (6 to 8) and Inter Trained (1 to 5)
Reference to Advertisement No. 415/2025: Eligible & Not Eligible Applicants List and Scheduled date for Physical Test & Interview of Eligible Applicants.
summary:
**1. Executive summary (one sentence)**  
The Jharkhand District Sports Office, Ranchi has published the eligible and not‑eligible applicant lists for Advertisement No. 415/2025 (Day Boarding Center Coaches Recruitment‑2025‑26) and announced that document verification will be held on 16 Dec 2025, with physical tests and interviews to follow, while objections must be submitted by 15 Dec 2025.

**2. Key points**  
- Advertisement No. 415/2025 dated 19‑Nov‑2025 (PR No. 366521) for Day Boarding Center Coaches recruitment.  
- Two lists are provided: **Eligible** applicants (qualified for interview & physical test) and **Not‑eligible** applicants (with reasons such as missing essential sports qualifications or late submission).  
- Eligible applicants are required to attend **document verification** (original certificates) on **16 Dec 2025** at 08:30 hrs at the District Sports Office, Ranchi.  
- After verification, eligible candidates will undergo a **physical test and interview** (date/time to be announced after verification).  
- Any applicant wishing to raise an objection regarding eligibility must submit it in writing to the office **by 15 Dec 2025**.  
- The complete lists and further instructions are posted on the official website: https://ranchi.nic.in.  

**3. Important dates / deadlines**  
- **Advertisement date:** 19 Nov 2025  
- **Objection submission deadline:** 15 Dec 2025  
- **Document verification (original certificates) for eligible applicants:** 16 Dec 2025, 08:30 hrs  
- **Physical test & interview:** To be scheduled after verification (exact date not specified in the snippet).  

**4. Action items**  
- **Eligible applicants:**  
  1. Report to the District Sports Office, Ranchi on 16 Dec 2025 at 08:30 hrs with all original certificates for verification.
